'''Chain''' was the name that [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] gave to a [[Duelist Elite/Legends|Duelist Elite]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that he used to train himself in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]]. As its name suggested, it was armed with a metal chain. It had a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-resistant [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] chassis, and it was programmed with an array of skills in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial arts]], that it could execute at speeds slightly faster than those of [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. It had been manufactured with an inhibitor that prevented it from killing its opponent after the droid was victorious, but this was removed by the Sith. In [[33 BBY/Legends|32.5 BBY]], Maul used his [[Darth Maul's double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to first cut off its legs at the knees and then vertically bisect it from between its legs to its head with a move called [[Rancor Rising]] as it fought against him with three other Duelist Elites, [[Cudgel (droid)|Cudgel]], [[Hachete (droid)|Hachete]], and [[Rapier (droid)|Rapier]], damaging it beyond repair.
